concerns.detail: The edit contains personal insults directed at another commenter rather than substantive criticism of advising practices. Phrases like '无能狂怒' (incompetent rage) and '不下头吗' (pathetic/embarrassing) constitute unsupported character judgments attacking the individual's competence and dignity.
concerns.excerpt: 自己被MSU鸽了在这里无能狂怒，不下头吗？有本事自己申四大去啊
